title: The single host knob — STACK_PUBLIC_HOST (opt-in, default localhost => byte-identical when unset) surfaced as the /demo-up --public-host flag, threaded through every rext browser-facing emitter (up-injected.sh build-args + .env.local overlays + demo_web rewrite + want_ep cache-validators; inject.py --fapi-host; gen_injected_override.py host-param seam; cockpit + ant-academy host+bind; stack_registry additive external_host)
kind: the v2.2 'panorama' release-opening milestone — Python + bash in the rext tooling (stack-core/stack_registry.py, stack-injection/inject.py + gen_injected_override.py, demo-stack/up-injected.sh + ant-academy.sh + rosetta-demo); ZERO platform-repo edits; ZERO Go touched. Code-of-record: rext tag panorama-m212 @ 770f81b (frozen at close — rext re-tag reserved for /developer-kit:close-release). The rosetta m212 branch carries ONLY plan/doc + the operator-surface SKILL edits.

tests.go_note: M212 touched ZERO Go — the knob is Python + bash in rext tooling. The rext Go modules (alignment/clerkenstein/stack-seeding/stack-snapshot/stack-secrets/playthroughs, ~1764 funcs at v2.1) are carried unchanged.
tests.counts_source: authoritative — JUnit XML tally (junit_tally.py) over pytest --junit-xml per section
tests.python_delta: +16 net-new test funcs across the milestone from the 2 harden passes: test_injection.py TestInjectMainArtifacts +7 (inject.main() end-to-end 0%->98% + pk padding grid) & test_frontend_build.py +7 (want_ep HOST-invalidation next-web/studio-desk + --public-host operator-flag behavior) & test_stack_registry.py TestExternalHost +2 (set_host additive-preservation + idempotent re-stamp). Build baseline stack-core 95 / stack-injection 123-incl-8skip / demo-stack 340.
tests.close_added_test: none — the close surfaced no defect requiring a new regression test; the 4 adversarial scenarios are each already handled and pinned by harden-added tests (recorded in decisions.md Adversarial review).
tests.flake_gate: 5/5 clean — each of the 3 M212-touched pytest suites run 5x sequentially in default order (stack-core 97 / stack-injection 122+8skip / demo-stack 350 identical each run; stdlib-unittest deterministic intra-suite order = the realistic CI condition; pytest-randomly not installed)

coverage.note: harden ran 2 passes (recorded in progress.md). inject.py 33% -> 98% statements (only the __main__ guard remains); gen_injected_override.py + stack_registry.py already 99%, held. Remaining misses are module-entry __main__ guards + one argparse-unreachable return 1 (subparsers required=True) — no behavioral value. Bash is I/O-bound (offline-uncoverable) — guarded by shellcheck + the byte-identity/flag tests.

delivered.the_knob: STACK_PUBLIC_HOST (default localhost) derived in up-injected.sh:44+ as HOST/FAPI_HOST/BIND_HOST — HOST for browser-facing URLs, FAPI_HOST with a DOTTED 127.0.0.1 default (D-IMPL-1: @clerk/backend rejects dotless localhost for the pk), BIND_HOST=0.0.0.0 ONLY when the knob is set (D-IMPL-2: external binding is opt-in, never default-on).
delivered.operator_surface: /demo-up --public-host <magicdns> flag AND the STACK_PUBLIC_HOST env-var form, both plumbed to up-injected.sh (flag parse loop + export for child launchers); documented in .claude/skills/demo-up/SKILL.md (argument-hint + the foundation-not-whole-feature note) + stack-list/SKILL.md (the additive external_host field).
delivered.browser_facing_substitution: $HOST replaces localhost in: next-web build-args (WUNDERGRAPH/BACKEND_API/HOSTING_URL) + .env.local overlays (STUDIO_URL/ACADEMY_URL/PUBLIC_WEBSITE_URL); studio-desk build-args (VITE_GRAPHQL_ENDPOINT/VITE_WEB_APP_URL); the pk-mint --fapi-host ($FAPI_HOST); the cockpit --app-base/--fapi-host/--academy-base; ant-academy NEXT_PUBLIC_STUDIO_URL; the demo_web Directus content-URL rewrite. Control-plane loopback (set-dress DSN, directus_addr) deliberately stays localhost.
delivered.cache_validity_fix: want_ep build-arg cache-validators (next-web + studio-desk) now embed $HOST so a HOST change invalidates a stale localhost-baked image (the overview's top-risk item; pinned by test_frontend_build.py).
delivered.registry: stack_registry.py additive external_host on allocate()/set_ports() + a NEW set_host() reconcile-then-upsert (adopts the docker-ps-adopted demo-N row) + the set-host CLI subcommand; rosetta-demo status renders external_host; up-injected.sh calls set-host ONLY on the opt-in path, non-fatal (D-IMPL-4).
delivered.seam_for_m214: gen_injected_override.py threads host through frontend_lines/build_lines + the --public-host flag, but the CORS + Clerk sign-in/web-app URL EMISSION stays localhost (byte-identical, pinned) — the emission is M214 (D-IMPL-3).

extensions.module: rosetta-extensions/ stack-core (stack_registry.py) + stack-injection (inject.py, gen_injected_override.py) + demo-stack (up-injected.sh, ant-academy.sh, rosetta-demo). Tests: test_stack_registry.py, test_injection.py, test_frontend_build.py, test_ant_academy.py, test_tooling.py.
